narrative:
Cuyahoga Heights Local Sd (Cuy) school district has 3,015 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
